scripts.test:unit:backend: node --env-file=.env --test test/unit/fred-route.test.js test/unit/bls-route.test.js test/unit/finnhub-route.test.js test/unit/fmp-route.test.js test/unit/edgar-route.test.js test/unit/yahoo-route.test.js test/unit/cboe-route.test.js test/unit/treasury-route.test.js test/unit/bea-route.test.js test/unit/polygon-route.test.js test/unit/etf-route.test.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:backend && npm run test:unit:frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
